textByHashes.ebdee5198a632cf446937e1e96d6e2fea174a3d5: Can I help you with drift net storage, human?
textByHashes.c8ed9fec7663062809e9521b8c0b043eb1b9e05d: My aunt lets people come in here to catch the fish. Sometimes they have trouble carrying enough stuff, so I help by holding onto spare drift nets for them.
textByHashes.6f53050661cf802b88a2597113862b38514feeaa: It's a free service to help more of you humans use Ceto's cave; she's paying me, so you don't have to. So can I help you with your drift nets?
